message:
test(fuzz): extend scalar_cast corpus with 6 cross-dtype seeds

The scalar_cast fuzz corpus had 4 seeds (identity_int64, lossy_float_
to_int, missing_float_seed plus repos in fuzz/corpus). Add 6 more
covering pandas-relevant cross-dtype conversions:

- bool_true_to_int: cast Bool(true) -> Int64 expect 1
- int_to_utf8: cast Int64(42) -> Utf8 expect "42"
- nan_to_int: cast NaN -> Int64 expect Null (no value)
- null_to_bool: cast Null -> Bool propagates Null
- float_inf_to_int: cast f64::INFINITY -> Int64 (out of range)
- bool_to_str: cast Bool(true) -> Utf8 expect "true"

Each seed exercises fuzz_scalar_cast_bytes which compares owned vs
borrowed cast paths and asserts identity round-trips for same-dtype
inputs.

[bd-frankenpandas-df59r]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
